title: prunella × intermedia
intro: Prunella × intermedia, also known as hybrid self-heal or self-heal, is a perennial herbaceous plant that is a cross between Prunella vulgaris and Prunella grandiflora. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Prunella × intermedia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections, making it a valuable natural remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Prunella × intermedia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from minor wounds to more serious infections.
